    <h4 {...{

    }}>{`Partial updates with PATCH`}</h4>
    <p>{`V2 adds `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`PATCH`}</inlineCode>{` support with JSON merge-patch semantics. Only the fields you include in the request body are updated — everything else is left unchanged. No more sending a full resource payload to change a single field.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`PATCH /v2/workspaces/{id}

          }}>{`RFC 7807 problem+json with `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`errors[]`}</inlineCode>{` array`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Error parsing update`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Field projection`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`?attributes=`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`?fieldIds=`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`?fieldAliases=`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Query param update`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Sorting key`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`sorting`}</inlineCode>{` array`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`sort`}</inlineCode>{` array`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Request body update`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`createdBy`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`updatedBy`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Plain ID string`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Object `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`{ id, name }`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Response parsing update`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`customerId`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`imsOrgId`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Present in responses`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`No longer returned in responses`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Response parsing update`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Bulk operations`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Not available`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`/records/bulk`}</inlineCode>{` endpoints`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`New capability`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Permissions API`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Not available`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`/v2/permissions/`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`New capability`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Permissions in response`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Embedded in resource DTO`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Removed — use Permissions API`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Response parsing update`}</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "migration-guide--updating-from-v1-to-v2"
    }}>{`Migration guide — updating from V1 to V2`}</h3>
    <p>{`Work through the checklist below in order. Each step includes before/after examples.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "1-update-your-base-url"
    }}>{`1. Update your base URL`}</h4>
    <p>{`Change the version segment in all request URLs from `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/v1/`}</inlineCode>{` to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/v2/`}</inlineCode>{`. Single-resource GETs by ID keep the same path pattern (e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`GET /v2/workspaces/{id}`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`GET /v2/record-types/{id}`}</inlineCode>{`), but the `}<strong parentName="p">{`listing`}</strong>{` path for record types did change — see step 2.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`Before: https://{customer-domain}/maestro/api/v1/workspaces
After:  https://{customer-domain}/maestro/api/v2/workspaces
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "2-update-record-type-listing"
    }}>{`2. Update record type listing`}</h4>
    <p>{`Move `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`workspaceId`}</inlineCode>{` from a query parameter to the URL path.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`Before: GET /v1/record-types?workspaceId={id}
After:  GET /v2/workspaces/{id}/record-types
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "3-update-record-creation-and-search"
    }}>{`3. Update record creation and search`}</h4>
    <p>{`Move `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`recordTypeId`}</inlineCode>{` from the request body to the URL path for both create and search.`}</p>
    <p>{`Create:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`Before: POST /v1/records             { "recordTypeId": "Rt123", ... }
After:  POST /v2/record-types/Rt123/records  { ... }
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Search:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`Before: POST /v1/records/search                      { "recordTypeId": "Rt123", ... }
After:  POST /v2/record-types/Rt123/records/search   { ... }
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Both `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`GET`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`POST`}</inlineCode>{` variants of search remain supported in V2 at `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/v2/record-types/{id}/records/search`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "4-handle-new-http-status-codes"
    }}>{`4. Handle new HTTP status codes`}</h4>
    <p>{`Update any logic that checks response status codes for create and delete operations.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`POST (create):  200 → 201 Created
DELETE:         200 → 204 No Content
Bulk (partial): — → 207 Multi-Status
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Bulk endpoints return `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`201`}</inlineCode>{` when every row succeeds and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`207 Multi-Status`}</inlineCode>{` when some rows fail — make sure your client inspects per-row results in the response envelope.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "5-update-pagination"
    }}>{`5. Update pagination`}</h4>
    <p>{`Remove `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`offset`}</inlineCode>{`/`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`limit`}</inlineCode>{` from the request body. Move to query parameters and update response parsing.`}</p>
    <p>{`Record search:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`Before (body):     { "offset": 0, "limit": 50 }
After  (query):    ?page=0&size=50

Before (response): { "records": [...], "totalCount": 150 }
After  (response): {
                     "records": [...],
                     "groups":  [...],   // present only on grouped searches
                     "page": { "size": 50, "number": 0, "totalElements": 150, "totalPages": 3 }
                   }
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Workspace and record type listings (cursor-based):`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`GET /v2/workspaces?limit=20&cursor={nextCursor}

Response: { "content": [...], "cursor": { "hasMore": true, "nextCursor": "..." } }
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "6-update-search-filter-syntax"
    }}>{`6. Update search filter syntax`}</h4>
    <p>{`Rebuild filters using typed enum operators. Move pagination params and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`recordTypeId`}</inlineCode>{` out of the filter body.`}</p>
    <p>{`Before (V1):`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`{
  "recordTypeId": "Rt123",
  "filters": {
    "$and": [
      { "fieldId": { "$is": "Active" } },
      { "fieldId": { "$contains": "marketing" } }
    ]
  },
  "offset": 0,
  "limit": 50
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`After (V2):`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`POST /v2/record-types/Rt123/records/search?page=0&size=50
{
  "filter": {
    "operator": "AND",
    "conditions": [
      { "fieldId": "<fieldId>", "condition": "IS", "value": "Active" },
      { "fieldId": "<fieldId>", "condition": "CONTAINS", "value": "marketing" }
    ]
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "7-update-error-handling"
    }}>{`7. Update error handling`}</h4>
    <p>{`Replace numeric `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`type`}</inlineCode>{` checks with string `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`errorCode`}</inlineCode>{` checks. Update any code that reads from the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`report`}</inlineCode>{` wrapper. V2 error responses are RFC 7807-compatible (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`application/problem+json`}</inlineCode>{`) with Planning-specific extensions.`}</p>
    <p>{`Before (V1):`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`{
  "type": 40001,
  "title": "Invalid Data",
  "report": { "detailedMessage": "Field name cannot be empty" }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`After (V2):`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`{
  "title": "Validation failed",
  "status": 400,
  "detail": "Request validation failed.",
  "errorCode": "VALIDATION_FAILED",
  "messageArguments": { },
  "requestId": "b7c3...e1",
  "errors": [
    { "field": "name", "message": "must not be blank" }
  ]
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Switch on the stable `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`errorCode`}</inlineCode>{` enum (e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`VALIDATION_FAILED`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`NOT_FOUND`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`CONFLICT`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`FORBIDDEN`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`UNAUTHORIZED`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`INTERNAL_ERROR`}</inlineCode>{`) rather than the HTTP status or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`title`}</inlineCode>{`. Always capture `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`requestId`}</inlineCode>{` in client logs — support tickets are resolved much faster with it.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "8-remove-permissions-from-resource-response-parsing"
    }}>{`8. Remove permissions from resource response parsing`}</h4>
    <p>{`V2 no longer includes permission level in resource DTOs. Switch to the Permissions API for any integration that reads the permission field from workspace or record type responses.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`GET /v2/permissions/{resourceType}/{resourceId}
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "9-update-response-field-parsing"
    }}>{`9. Update response field parsing`}</h4>
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`customerId`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`imsOrgId`}</inlineCode>{` are no longer returned in responses — remove any client parsing for them. Update `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`createdBy`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`updatedBy`}</inlineCode>{` parsing from a plain string to an object.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`Before: "createdBy": "user123"
After:  "createdBy": { "id": "user123", "name": "Jane Doe" }
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "10-update-field-projection"
    }}>{`10. Update field projection`}</h4>
    <p>{`Replace the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`?attributes=`}</inlineCode>{` query parameter with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`?fieldIds=`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`?fieldAliases=`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`Before: /v1/records/search?attributes=data,createdBy
After:  /v2/record-types/{id}/records/search?fieldIds=F123,F456
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "11-update-sorting-key"
    }}>{`11. Update sorting key`}</h4>
    <p>{`Rename the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`sorting`}</inlineCode>{` array key to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`sort`}</inlineCode>{` in search request bodies.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`Before: { "sorting": [{ "fieldId": "F123", "direction": "asc" }] }
After:  { "sort":    [{ "fieldId": "F123", "direction": "asc" }] }
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "12-adopt-patch-for-partial-updates-recommended"
    }}>{`12. Adopt PATCH for partial updates (recommended)`}</h4>
    <p>{`Not a breaking change — `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`PUT`}</inlineCode>{` still works — but switching updates to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`PATCH`}</inlineCode>{` reduces payload size and eliminates the risk of accidentally nulling fields.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "13-adopt-bulk-endpoints-for-high-volume-record-operations-recommended"
    }}>{`13. Adopt bulk endpoints for high-volume record operations (recommended)`}</h4>
    <p>{`If your integration creates, updates, or deletes records in loops, replace individual calls with the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/records/bulk`}</inlineCode>{` endpoints for significantly better performance. Remember to handle `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`207 Multi-Status`}</inlineCode>{` for partial success.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "next-steps"
    }}>{`Next steps`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "/Workfront-Planning-API/api/v2/"
        }}>{`Full API V2 reference`}</a></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/workfront/using/adobe-workfront-planning/adobe-workfront-planning-general-information/planning-api-basics"
        }}>{`API Basics`}</a>{` — authentication, filtering, pagination, and field types`}</li>
    </ul>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
